sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FT Vest美國股票增強與適度緩衝主動型ETF-4月-XAPR-ETF多空報酬
feed.summary: The article provides performance data for the FT Vest U.S. Equity Enhanced & Moderate Buffer Active ETF - April (XAPR). It details the ETF's returns during both bullish and bearish market periods, comparing them against index performance over various timeframes. The data shows the ETF's positive returns during periods of index gains and its negative returns during index downturns, reflecting its buffer strategy.

feed.title: Riot Platforms Faces Strategic Shifts as Market Volatility Intensifies
feed.summary: Riot Platforms (RIOT) is navigating significant strategic shifts due to increased market volatility and declining investor confidence, with its stock trading down by -7.81%. The company, a major Bitcoin miner, is exploring partnerships and re-evaluating its growth strategies amidst tightening regulations, competitive pressures, and fluctuating Bitcoin prices. Its future profitability heavily depends on Bitcoin price stability and strategic infrastructure investments as it confronts operational challenges and aims to solidify its financial standing.

feed.title: Will Tompkins Financial’s (TMP) Stronger Earnings and Higher Dividend Payout Reshape Its Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Tompkins Financial (TMP) reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results with higher net interest income and net income, leading to an increased quarterly dividend of US$0.67 per share. Despite a rise in net charge-offs, the company's improved earnings strengthen its investment narrative, though credit quality will remain a key focus for investors. The shares are currently trading above their fair value according to some community estimates.

feed.title: Amgen Lawsuit And Eczema Drug Exit Reframe Risk And R&D Priorities
feed.summary: Amgen is facing a lawsuit for withdrawing discounted drug prices from clinics serving underserved patients, criticized for potentially restricting access to medicine and breaching state law. Simultaneously, Amgen ended its collaboration on rocatinlimab, an eczema treatment, signaling a shift in its R&D priorities. These events highlight the company's evolving commercial practices, regulatory risks, and strategic capital allocation in its immunology pipeline.

feed.title: Lamb Weston Fries Range Named Product of the Year 2026 in UK Chips Category
feed.summary: Lamb Weston's full fries range has been named Product of the Year 2026 in the UK Chips category, an award based on a large consumer survey recognizing innovation and quality. The winning range includes products like Frenzy French Fries, Twister Fries, and Thick Cut Pub Chips, highlighting Lamb Weston's commitment to diverse shapes, textures, and flavors for the retail market. This recognition reinforces the brand's position as a leader in innovative frozen potato products, building on its history of pioneering chip-cutting techniques.

feed.title: Latham & Watkins Advises on Vaxcyte’s US$550 Million Public Offering
feed.summary: Latham & Watkins LLP advised the underwriters in Vaxcyte, Inc.'s US$550 million public offering of common stock. The Latham & Watkins team was led by Shayne Kennedy and Richard Kim, with support on regulatory, IP, and tax matters.

feed.title: Xcel Energy’s Upcoming Earnings Report: A Crucial Test Amid Operational Headwinds
feed.summary: Xcel Energy Inc. is set to release its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, facing scrutiny after operational difficulties including proactive power shutoffs in Colorado. The energy company is also dealing with rising consumer costs due to higher natural gas prices and is seeking rate increases to fund infrastructure and renewable energy transitions. This earnings report will be a key indicator of the company's ability to balance growth strategies with regulatory challenges and public concerns.

feed.title: Wipro GE Healthcare Expands Multi-city Health Yatra’ to Showcase Latest Technology in Hyderabad
feed.summary: Wipro GE Healthcare has commenced the third phase of its 'Health Yatra' in Telangana, expanding its multi-city initiative to showcase advanced healthcare technologies. The program, aligned with the Atmanirbhar Bharat vision, aims to provide wider access to sophisticated ultrasound and patient care solutions, especially in underserved communities. The 'Health Yatra' includes interactive product demos and collaborative sessions, empowering clinicians and enhancing patient care across the state, and is currently featured at the IRIA 2026 Annual Conference in Hyderabad.

feed.title: Rio Tinto share price slips into the weekend as Brazil aluminium deal meets a metal-price pullback

feed.title: Morgan Stanley lists 4 key themes and 10 predictions for 2026
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has released its 2026 outlook, identifying four key themes: AI/Tech Diffusion, The Future of Energy, The Multipolar World, and Societal Shifts. These themes underpin 10 macro predictions, including major advancements in AI, increased compute demand, a robust U.S. policy agenda, and shifts in global manufacturing. The bank anticipates significant economic impacts from AI, such as employment disruption and deflationary pressures, highlighting the need for adaptive government and corporate strategies.

feed.title: SB Financial Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: SB Financial Group reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with diluted EPS of $0.63 for Q4 and $2.19 for the full year, marking the company's 60th consecutive quarter of profitability. Net interest income rose by nearly 17% in Q4 and 21% for the full year, driven by balance sheet growth and wider margins. The company also demonstrated solid balance sheet and credit trends, including significant loan and deposit growth, strong liquidity, and improved non-performing loan metrics, while returning capital to shareholders through buybacks and increased dividends.

feed.title: MDA Space and SatixFy Announce Amended Merger Agreement for Increased Consideration
feed.summary: MDA Space and SatixFy Communications Ltd. have amended their merger agreement, increasing the all-cash consideration for SatixFy shareholders to US$3.00 per ordinary share, implying an aggregate equity value of approximately US$280 million. This amendment follows a "go-shop" process where SatixFy received an alternative all-stock acquisition proposal, leading to further negotiations with MDA. The SatixFy Board unanimously recommends the revised all-cash transaction, deeming it the best value for shareholders.
